mano_cua.result_summary: mano-cua 尝试在 basic-usage 页插入超链接后导航到 readonly 页面，但 readonly 页面的编辑器内容是独立的预设文本（无超链接），无法在同一编辑器实例中切换只读模式。尝试多次在 readonly 页面的编辑器中插入链接，但只读模式下无法编辑内容。超 80 步停止。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The readonly editor shows plain text 'Hello TinyEditor!' - not a link. The basic-usage page and readonly page have separate editor instances, so inserting a link on basic-usage doesn't carry over to readonly.
